facebook.caption: POV: you take a wrong turn off the main strip and find Quán Ăn 93. Address is 93/185 Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi, Khu 2. No neon signs. No tourist menus. Just a 4.3-star local bistro with 344 reviews from people who actually live here. That ratio means something. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked straight past this twice. Quán Ăn 93 sits off the main road, 344 reviews deep, and the locals here are not eating for the 'gram. They're eating because the food is just good.

instagram.caption: POV: wrong turn. Right restaurant. Quán Ăn 93, 4.3 stars, 344 local reviews. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: No tourist menu. No big sign. Just Quán Ăn 93 and 344 people who keep coming back.

tiktok.caption: Took a wrong turn and found this. Quán Ăn 93 hits different. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel

video_script.hook: Took a wrong turn. Found this.
scenes: Walk down side street, locals on bikes passing
Small bistro front, no tourist signage
Close-up: steaming bowls hit the table
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
